sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53135" key="ka/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καίω</etym>) <sense id="n53135.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thatwhich burns</tr_>, etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Χάος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
